title: Comparing Proof Versions Side by Side
excerpt: When reviewing documents, in particular new versions of files, it would be helpful to be able to view previous versions side by side. This way if you review a file and post edits/comments, then the designer posts a new v…

posts.author: Starkml (Maggie Stark)
posts.cookedHtml: When reviewing documents, in particular new versions of files, it would be helpful to be able to view previous versions side by side. This way if you review a file and post edits/comments, then the designer posts a new version - being able to view old and new side by side will help the reviewer make sure all their edits were made. This is especially helpful with longer multi-page documents.
